title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.1057 - State aid, nonresident student enrolled in option district to be counted as resident
text:
162.1057.  State aid, nonresident student enrolled in option district to be counted as resident. — Notwithstanding the provisions of chapter 163 to the contrary, for the purposes of determining state aid, a nonresident student enrolled pursuant to sections 162.1040 to 162.1059 in an enrollment option district shall be counted as a resident pupil.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1218 § 4)
